evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Audit AI-generated pipelines and code for enterprise-grade reliability
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: One rigour-adjacent reliability/audit signal is balanced against consulting-speed language like 'optimization opportunities' and rapid client delivery, giving parity rather than a dominant orientation.
evidence.domain_risk: reeeliance guides regulated enterprises in transforming AI readiness into embedded operations
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The company explicitly serves regulated enterprise clients, and the candidate audits AI-generated pipelines for 'enterprise-grade reliability,' pushing this into high domain risk despite no direct financial-reporting language.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Design and develop ETL/ELT solutions leveraging Snowflake and GenAI/agentic solutions
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools (Snowflake, Power BI) appear in responsibilities alongside consulting/mentoring duties, indicating a growing but not yet fully mature practice.
evidence.jd_authorship: Serve as primary technical liaison translating business needs into specifications and data models; Champion engineering best practices and mentor team members
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Some bullets name specific tools and actions (Snowflake ETL/ELT, Power BI dashboards) while others are generic consulting boilerplate ('guide clients on AI/data strategy'), giving a mixed signal.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Guide clients on AI/data strategy and identify optimization opportunities
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: As a consultancy role, the primary audience is external clients receiving advisory and delivery work, which maps closest to commercial orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Guide clients on AI/data strategy and identify optimization opportunities; Serve as primary technical liaison
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role combines strategic client advisory (guide, champion) with scoped technical delivery (design, develop, audit), giving a mixed autonomy profile.
evidence.ai_role: Audit AI-generated pipelines and code for enterprise-grade reliability; Hands-on GenAI/AI tool experience for development workflows
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate is expected both to use AI tools to accelerate their own development work and to build/audit AI-generated data pipelines that AI systems produce, so ai_enabler applies as the stronger signal per the tie-breaker.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal present.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No mention of dbt tests, data contracts, Great Expectations, Soda, or any explicit data quality/testing framework.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Audit AI-generated pipelines and code for enterprise-grade reliability
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Reliability auditing for regulated enterprise clients is present but secondary to the delivery/advisory framing dominating the JD, keeping this at moderate rather than high.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design and develop ETL/ELT solutions leveraging Snowflake and GenAI/agentic solutions
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role both designs new AI-driven pipelines and audits/optimizes existing client systems, giving a mixed greenfield/fix signal.
evidence.loss_aversion: "Audit AI-generated pipelines and code for enterprise-grade reliability" — reliability is a secondary concern behind consulting delivery and client-facing strategy work.
